headline: Will Robust Cardiovascular Performance Fuel BSX's Q1 Earnings?
summary: Boston Scientific heads into Q1 earnings with strong Cardiovascular momentum and steady MedSurg growth, as estimates point to solid revenue and earnings gains.

headline: Boston Scientific (BSX) Q1 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Boston Scientific (BSX), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.
